0.description: Veiled Sign of Keleria, kept by Rain Oath of Elhelm is a omen myth of storms and change first told in Marara around Aldo Torfell under Elport the Gale Keeper. The creation claim says Elport the Gale Keeper drove the first people to Marara through warning winds and hard renewal. Its symbols are tied to Belora Spire and Elreach Highstone.

1.description: Ashen Year of Harora, kept by Rain Oath of Elhelm is a cataclysm myth of storms and change first told in Marara around Gorm Wendhold under Harton the Thunder Lord. Its symbols are tied to Belora Spire and Elreach Highstone.

2.description: Bound Oath of Galreach, kept by Rain Oath of Elhelm is a covenant myth of storms and change first told in Marara around Fiora Mareria under Quaovar the Rain Mother. Its symbols are tied to Belora Spire and Elreach Highstone.

3.description: Named Trial of Dorreach, kept by Counting Creed of Galdrim is a heroic myth of trade and exchange first told in Peldun around Bram Valfield the 5th under Galstead the Market Keeper. The creation claim says Galstead the Market Keeper seated the first market at Peldun where bargains could be witnessed. Its symbols are tied to Ilvale River.

4.description: Bound Oath of Ulstead, kept by Counting Creed of Galdrim is a covenant myth of trade and exchange first told in Peldun around Gorm Pelhelm under Marara the Scale Mother. Its symbols are tied to Ilvale River.

5.description: Old Promise of Valdrim, kept by Counting Creed of Galdrim is a covenant myth of trade and exchange first told in Peldun around Zane Galreach the 5th under Corvale the Coin Witness. Its symbols are tied to Ilvale River.

6.description: Hero's Crossing of Quadun, kept by Counting Creed of Kelwatch is a heroic myth of trade and exchange first told in Nordrim around Sorn Orhelm under Ordrim the Coin Witness. The creation claim says Ordrim the Coin Witness seated the first market at Nordrim where bargains could be witnessed. Its symbols are tied to Ilvale River.

7.description: Shield Tale of Ordun, kept by Counting Creed of Kelwatch is a heroic myth of trade and exchange first told in Nordrim around Gala Vorhill the 5th under Lorara the Scale Mother. Its symbols are tied to Ilvale River.

8.description: Sacred Compact of Juneria, kept by Counting Creed of Kelwatch is a covenant myth of trade and exchange first told in Nordrim around Gideon Orhelm the 5th under Rivport the Road Father. Its symbols are tied to Ilvale River.

9.description: First Stone of Harmere, kept by Peak Rite of Armere is a creation myth of mountains and stone first told in Junwatch around Odo Lorwatch the 6th under Ulia the Stone Father. The creation claim says Ulia the Stone Father raised Junwatch under stone signs so boundaries would be remembered. Its symbols are tied to Belora Spire and Lorwatch Rootmouth.

10.description: First Fire of Corovar, kept by Peak Rite of Armere is a creation myth of mountains and stone first told in Junwatch around Odo Lorwatch the 6th under Nordrim the Peak Mother. The creation claim says Nordrim the Peak Mother raised Junwatch under stone signs so boundaries would be remembered. Its symbols are tied to Belora Spire and Lorwatch Rootmouth.

11.description: Named Trial of Dorreach, kept by Peak Rite of Armere is a heroic myth of mountains and stone first told in Junwatch around Gala Orhelm the 7th under Arton the Deep Keeper. Its symbols are tied to Belora Spire and Lorwatch Rootmouth.

12.description: Bound Oath of Belvale, kept by Night Path of Coreria is a covenant myth of stars and knowledge first told in Riveria around Gorm Pelia the 8th under Ordrim the Far Seer. The creation claim says Ordrim the Far Seer placed Riveria beneath watchable skies so omens could be recorded. Its symbols are tied to Galdrim Highstone and Ilora Strand.

13.description: Sacred Compact of Sarwatch, kept by Night Path of Coreria is a covenant myth of stars and knowledge first told in Riveria around Fiora Noreria the 9th under Ilvale the Night Mother. Its symbols are tied to Galdrim Highstone and Ilora Strand.

14.description: Veiled Sign of Quadun, kept by Night Path of Coreria is a omen myth of stars and knowledge first told in Riveria around Petra Norbark the 17th under Quaovar the Lantern Lord. Its symbols are tied to Galdrim Highstone and Ilora Strand.
